name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and the UK, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with more than 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including all Mexican states and Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need fast access to funds or affordable goods.

FirstCash's core business model centers on pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property such as jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond lending, the company operates a substantial retail business buying and selling a wide variety of merchandise. FirstCash also offers layaway services with a 10% down payment option, gold/precious metal buying services, and through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions across 15,000+ merchant partner locations. The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive scale and geographic reach—3,300+ locations make it significantly larger than regional competitors. The company emphasizes the speed and accessibility of pawn loans (no credit checks required), the variety of merchandise available for purchase, and the convenience of layaway services. The integration of technology-driven point-of-sale solutions and the lease-to-own network through AFF represents diversification beyond traditional pawn lending.

For consumers, FirstCash represents a legitimate but high-cost alternative to traditional credit. Pawn loans are non-recourse (you don't lose collateral to debt collection if unpaid), and there are no credit requirements, making them accessible to underbanked populations. However, pawn loans carry implicit interest rates that can be substantial when annualized, and the loss of personal property—however voluntary—represents a real financial and emotional cost. The retail merchandise quality and pricing varies by location.
address: 510 S Bell Blvd, Cedar Park, TX 78613

company_info.headquarters: 510 S Bell Blvd, Cedar Park, TX 78613

pros: 3,300+ locations provide exceptional convenience and accessibility across North America and Latin America
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no credit checks, credit score impact, or debt collection if loan is not repaid
Fast cash availability on-the-spot when pledging personal property
Layaway service allows purchasing items with just 10% down payment, providing alternative to credit
Wide variety of retail merchandise for purchase, including second-hand goods at lower prices
Gold and precious metal buying service provides immediate cash for items most consumers have
No minimum credit history or income verification required to access loans
cons: Pawn loans carry high implicit interest rates when annualized (typically 10-25% per month = 120-300% APY), making them expensive compared to traditional credit
Risk of losing sentimental or valuable personal property if unable to repay the loan within the grace period
Limited transparency on the website regarding specific loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, and fees
Not a credit-building option—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so they don't help establish or improve credit history
Merchandise quality and pricing varies significantly by individual store location
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need emergency cash and have no access to traditional credit
Consumers with damaged credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
People who own valuable jewelry, electronics, or instruments and need short-term funds without selling permanently
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted retail goods and second-hand merchandise
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers who own valuable personal property and need emergency cash quickly without credit checks or approval processes. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive when annualized and carry the real risk of losing personal property; they should be viewed as a temporary bridge, not a long-term financial solution, and consumers should explore lower-cost alternatives like credit unions, CDFIs, or employer advances first.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Retail sales of new and used merchandise
Gold and precious metal buying services
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment
Cash-on-the-spot payments for sold items and pledged collateral
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Store locator tool with 2,500+ searchable locations
Non-recourse lending (no personal liability for unpaid loans)
